rationale: This statute governs the composition and terms of a board of directors for a center. It contains no provisions related to property tax, homestead exemptions, or school funding that would be affected by the proposed change.
quote: The center is advised by a board of directors composed of:
_note: Educ. Code §37.203 pertains to board composition for a center; it has no nexus to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
